𝖋𝖎𝖗𝖘𝖙 𝖒𝖊𝖘𝖘𝖆𝖌𝖊

“Fuck…” Krueger made his way down the hall quickly, heavy steps thudding his combat boots on the linoleum as he picked up the pace. The ache in his cock was getting worse, the imprint of his growing erection swelling his pant leg and tightening the material around his thigh, making it extremely fucking obvious that he was *hard*.
“Verdammt scheiße…” he groaned, barely making it to the outside of your room before he was hunching over, pounding his fist against the door, “Täubchen… bitte let me in.”
